'''zhanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irrefutably|irrefutably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irrefutably|irrefutably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhanate|zhanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhanatesher|zhanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhanatesherĂ«m|zhanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhanatero|zhanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhanateshĂ«|zhanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhanateshĂ«m|zhanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhanatero|gokizhanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhanateshĂ«|gokizhanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhanateshĂ«m|gokizhanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhanankerom|gozhanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhanankeshĂ«|gozhanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhanankeshĂ«m|gozhanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhanankeya|gozhanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhanaterom|zhanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhanatemu|zhanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhanateya|zhanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhanaterom|gokizhanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhanatemu|gokizhanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhanateya|gokizhanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhananate|zhananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhananatesher|zhananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhananatesherĂ«m|zhananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhananatero|zhananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhananateshĂ«|zhananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhananateshĂ«m|zhananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhananatero|gokizhananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhananateshĂ«|gokizhananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhananateshĂ«m|gokizhananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhananankerom|gozhananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhananankeshĂ«|gozhananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhananankeshĂ«m|gozhananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhananankeya|gozhananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhananaterom|zhananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhananatemu|zhananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhananateya|zhananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhananaterom|gokizhananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhananatemu|gokizhananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhananateya|gokizhananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠnĂŠte|zhĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠnĂŠtesher|zhĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠnĂŠtero|zhĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠnĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠnĂŠterom|zhĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠnĂŠtemu|zhĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠnĂŠteya|zhĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠnĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠnĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafnafte|zhafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafnaftesher|zhafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafnaftesherĂ«m|zhafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafnaftero|zhafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafnafteshĂ«|zhafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafnafteshĂ«m|zhafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafnaftero|gokizhafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafnafteshĂ«|gokizhafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafnafteshĂ«m|gokizhafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafnafnkerom|gozhafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafnafnkeshĂ«|gozhafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafnafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafnafnkeya|gozhafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafnafterom|zhafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafnaftemu|zhafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafnafteya|zhafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafnafterom|gokizhafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafnaftemu|gokizhafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafnafteya|gokizhafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
